steps.title: Identify what the blank needs
steps.content: The blank fills "alongside the ______ associated with the Black Arts movement." It needs two plain plural nouns: the collective output ("works") and the people ("writers"). The phrase "of other writers" is a prepositional phrase, not a possessive.

steps.title: Rule: apostrophes mark possession or contraction, not simple plurals
steps.content:
Per-choice diagnosis:

A. "work's of other writer's" — "work's" is singular possessive (one work's thing) and "writer's" is singular possessive; neither makes sense here. Incorrect.

B. "works of other writers" — plain plurals with no apostrophes. "The works of other writers" = the output of multiple writers. Correct.

C. "work's of other writers" — "work's" is possessive, but what it possesses is unclear; a possessive cannot precede the preposition "of" this way. Incorrect.

D. "works of other writer's" — "writer's" is singular possessive, not a plain plural; it also makes no sense with the preposition "of." Incorrect.

B is correct.
